text.title: Load Balancing Concepts Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the routing decision depend on HTTP semantics (path / header / cookie / SSL termination at the LB)?

branch.question: Does the application require session affinity AND cannot externalise state?

conclusion.verdict: L7 + dynamic algorithm (least-connections) + externalised session in Redis
L7 + sticky-cookie with documented fallback path; flag tech-debt to externalise

branch.question: Is the protocol stateful or long-lived (gaming, MQTT, persistent TCP)?

text.example: http_semantics_required=true (path-based /api vs /static routing) → session_externalisable=true (Redis already in stack) → L7 + least-connections + externalised session in Redis. References rule layer-choice.
